title: Statistics show 0 production executions
symptom: The n8n dashboard displays 0 production executions despite workflows running successfully. This discrepancy occurs after a recent update.
applies_when: Pruning is enabled with maxAge set to 1 hour
not_this_if: Pruning maxAge is set to more than 1 hour
root_cause: When the pruning settings are too aggressive, execution data is deleted before the statistics can be calculated, leading to misleading information in the dashboard.
fix_steps: Increase the maxAge for pruning to at least 24 hours
Monitor the statistics to see if they update correctly
agent_instruction: Increase the maxAge for pruning to at least 24 hours in the configuration settings.
